description: Per-month aggregated response time statistics for all three duration metrics, consumed by Power BI via Folder.Files().

columns.name: Response_Type
columns.description: Priority classification: Emergency, Urgent, or Routine.

columns.name: MM-YY
columns.description: Month-Year label for the aggregation period (zero-padded month, two-digit year).

columns.name: First_Response_Time_MMSS
columns.description: Average response time formatted as M:SS (minutes and seconds).

columns.name: Avg_Minutes
columns.description: Average response time in decimal minutes, rounded to 4 decimal places.

columns.name: Record_Count
columns.description: Number of valid records contributing to this aggregation group.

columns.name: Median_Minutes
columns.description: Median response time in decimal minutes for the group.

metrics.label: Travel Time
metrics.business_meaning: Time from dispatch to officer departure/arrival on scene

metrics.label: Total Response
metrics.calculation: Time Out minus Time of Call
metrics.business_meaning: Total elapsed time from citizen call to officer on scene

metrics.label: Dispatch Queue
metrics.calculation: Time Dispatched minus Time of Call
metrics.business_meaning: Time the call waited in queue before being dispatched

timereport_yearly.discovery: Dynamic via pathlib.glob, min_year = current year - 1

timereport_monthly.discovery: Dynamic via pathlib.glob, min_year = current year - 1

source_columns_used.name: Incident
source_columns_used.purpose: Call type descriptor for normalization and classification

source_columns_used.name: How Reported
source_columns_used.purpose: Method of call initiation for Layer 1 filter

source_columns_used.name: Time of Call
source_columns_used.purpose: Timestamp when citizen call was received

source_columns_used.name: Time Out
source_columns_used.purpose: Timestamp when unit went en route or arrived on scene

source_columns_used.name: Response Type
source_columns_used.purpose: CAD-assigned priority (may be missing or invalid)

layer_2_incident_exclusion.description: Excludes ~234 administrative, self-initiated, and non-dispatched incident types

layer_3_category_type.description: Safety net exclusion by Category_Type from CallType_Categories.csv

response_type_resolution.description: Priority cascade for backfilling missing Response_Type values

priority.description: Use Response Type column if already Emergency, Urgent, or Routine
Look up raw Incident string in CallType_Categories.csv
Apply _normalize() and look up in CallType_Categories.csv

bounds_filter.over_cap_handling: Excluded, logged at WARNING level with per-type breakdown

data_quality_safeguards.name: Unmapped Response Type
data_quality_safeguards.trigger: Incident not resolved by any lookup
